From My Kitchen ♡made with love for the people I love

Creamy Pesto Chicken Pasta Bake ♡

Creamy, cheesy, and full of flavor — the ultimate comfort bake.

SERVES
6–8
PREP
20 min
COOK
20 min
TOTAL
40 min

Ingredients ♡

Directions ♡

1
Preheat the oven to 350°F. Set the cream on the counter so it can come to room temperature.
2
Boil the noodles in salted water a few minutes less than the package directions. Drain and set aside.
3
Cook the chicken in sun-dried tomato oil until no longer pink. Let it rest, then cut it into bite-sized pieces.
4
Melt the butter in the same pan. Add the seasonings, onion, and garlic.
5
Turn the heat to low. Slowly stir in the heavy cream and let it simmer gently.
6
Add half the Parmesan and 1 cup mozzarella. Stir until smooth and melted.
7
Fold in the sun-dried tomatoes, broccoli, spinach, chicken, pasta, and pesto.
8
Top with the remaining mozzarella and Parmesan.
9
Bake for 15 minutes, then broil until golden and bubbly.
10
Finish with parsley and a little extra Parmesan. Let it rest for a few minutes before serving.

From My Kitchen ♡

This is one of those recipes everyone asks me for after dinner. It reheats beautifully, and I always make extra because the leftovers disappear.

Teaching Tip ♡
Let the cream come to room temperature so it blends in smoothly without lumps.

What you need for this step ♡
